scripts.version: changeset version && biome check --write . && pnpm install --lockfile-only

pnpm.//overrides: The serialize-javascript and tmp overrides patch two high-severity transitive CVEs (GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq via mocha 10.8 → serialize-javascript 6.0.2; GHSA-ph9p-34f9-6g65 via wxt 0.20 → web-ext-run → tmp 0.2.5) — both dev-only transitives pinned forward as defense-in-depth (Phase 4a, 2026-05-28). The js-yaml overrides patch GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68 (quadratic-complexity DoS in merge-key handling): js-yaml@3.14.2 reaches the tree via changesets → @manypkg/get-packages → read-yaml-file, and js-yaml@4.1.1 via astro markdown-remark + @changesets/parse. The vite@6 and esbuild overrides clear the last two Scorecard advisories that no upstream dep had picked up yet: vite 6.4.2 (GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff / GHSA-v6wh-96g9-6wx3, via vitest@3 + wxt) → 6.4.3, and esbuild 0.27.7 / 0.28.0 (GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr, via astro@6 + wxt + tsx) → 0.28.1. All dev/build-time transitives; remove each once the parent dependency ships the patched version. WXT 0.20's toolchain stays on the Vite-6 line, so its @wxt-dev/module-react must keep @vitejs/plugin-react on 5.x — plugin-react 6.x imports `vite/internal`, which only exists in vite 7+. The pin is scoped to @wxt-dev/module-react so the todomvc demo (Vite 8) keeps plugin-react 6. vite-node is pinned to the 3.x line shared by vitest@3 and WXT (Scorecard vuln sweep, 2026-06-30).
